title: End-to-end review of Generator connection pipeline
goal: Review the recently built Generator connection pipeline from start to finish and report completeness, edge cases, and improvement points.

include: Recent task reports and ledgers related to Generator pipeline
exclude: Implementation of follow-up fixes unless separately requested

success_criteria: Trace the pipeline from task creation through handoff, Generator execution, artifacts, validation boundary, retry handling, and reporting.
Identify concrete risks and edge cases with file references.
Distinguish automated behavior from manual/operator behavior.
Give a readiness assessment and prioritized improvement plan.

positive: Avoid executing real external Generator runs.
Run safe static or dry-run checks where useful.
negative: Do not include secrets or environment variable values.
Do not modify production or harness behavior during this review.
